mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_email = #{user_email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, user_email, user_role, user_real_name, user_gender, user_phone, user_birth, user_address, user_like_player, user_like_player_gb, user_marketing) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{user_email}, #{user_role}, #{user_real_name}, #{user_gender}, #{user_phone}, #{user_birth}, #{user_address}, #{user_like_player}, #{user_like_player_gb}, #{user_marketing})
